title: Patagonia: At the End of the World
description: Trekking through the dramatic landscapes of southern Patagonia — wind-battered plains, turquoise glacial lakes, and the iconic granite spires of Torres del Paine. Five days on the W Trek, condors overhead, and a puma crossing the path at dusk.

title: Autumn Colours in Rural Japan
description: Chasing koyo — the Japanese autumn colour season — through ancient temple gardens and forested mountain roads.

title: Into the Sahara
description: A camel trek into the Erg Chebbi dunes and the blue city of Chefchaouen.

title: The Norwegian Fjords in Winter
description: Searching for the northern lights above snow-covered fishing cabins in the Lofoten archipelago.
